config

Manage versionator configuration including version prefix, pre-release, metadata, and custom variables.

Usage

Subcommands

CommandDescription
prefixManage version prefix (v, V)
prereleaseManage pre-release identifiers and stability
metadataManage build metadata and stability
customManage custom key-value pairs
varsShow all available template variables

prefix

Manage version prefix in VERSION file.

Only ‘v’ or ‘V’ prefixes are allowed per SemVer convention.

Commands

prerelease

Manage pre-release identifier and stability.

Examples

Stability

StabilityDefaultBehavior
falseYesGenerated from template at output time
trueNoStored directly in VERSION file

metadata

Manage build metadata and stability.

Examples

Stability

StabilityDefaultBehavior
falseYesGenerated from template at output time
trueNoStored directly in VERSION file

custom

Manage custom key-value pairs that can be used in templates.

Custom variables are stored in .versionator.yaml and available as {{KeyName}} in templates.

Examples

vars

Display all available template variables and their current values.

This is useful for understanding what variables are available when creating custom templates.

Edit page
